title: Activities in emaisl and activitities carry over if you duplicate a board
excerpt: A feature request has been received from a user.  The user proposes that the functionality to duplicate a board be enhanced to include the activities logged within the Emails & Activities app.  Currently, only the board’…

posts.author: yun (yuneisy)
posts.cookedHtml: A feature request has been received from a user. The user proposes that the functionality to duplicate a board be enhanced to include the activities logged within the Emails & Activities app. Currently, only the board’s items and updates are copied. The user notes that including the activitys would provide a more complete record and enhance workflow efficiency

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Interesting idea from the user, including Emails & Activities when duplicating boards would improve workflow efficiency by preserving the full activity history. Having that complete record transferred over would be really useful, especially for teams relying on the Emails & Activities features.
